prompt: Create a highly detailed cinematic anime illustration of a graceful silver-haired shrine festival girl reclining low on a glossy rain-wet stone street at night during an ornate East Asian lantern festival. She is a beautiful young woman with very long flowing silver-white hair, blue eyes, a soft confident smile, teal painted fingernails and toenails, and elaborate floral hair ornaments with dangling gold-and-teal beads. She wears a luxurious black silk kimono with dense gold filigree, teal accents, and large red, white, and gold chrysanthemum flowers, posed in dramatic low-angle perspective with one knee raised toward the viewer and one hand reaching forward. Show exactly two futuristic strapless black lacquer platform geta sandals in the foreground, oversized and sculptural, with no toe thong; decorate them with gold chrysanthemum patterns, red-and-teal brocade panels, pearl-like beads, and long teal tassels. Surround her with a glowing festival scene: exactly two large prominent paper lanterns, one red lantern at the upper left and one warm cream lantern at the upper right, each with vertical calligraphy reading 龍蜜; add smaller blurred lanterns, red temple architecture, hanging purple wisteria, banners with floral motifs, warm amber light, reflections on the wet pavement, sparkling bokeh, and shallow depth of field. Use ultra-polished gpt-image-2 anime aesthetics, intricate textile detail, rich contrast, dramatic foreshortening, glossy highlights, warm festival illumination, 16:9 widescreen composition, no watermark, no extra characters.

promptZh: 创作一张细节极其丰富的电影感动漫插画，描绘 一位优雅的银发神社祭典少女 在夜晚东亚灯会期间，慵懒地斜倚在雨后湿润的亮面石板路上。她是一位美丽的年轻女性，拥有极长的 银白色 飘逸长发、蓝色双眸、自信柔和的微笑、青色指甲油和脚趾甲油，以及带有金色和青色垂坠珠饰的精致花卉发饰。她身穿奢华的黑色丝绸和服，上面绣有密集的金丝花纹、青色装饰以及硕大的红、白、金三色菊花图案，采用戏剧性的低角度透视，一只膝盖抬向观众，一只手向前伸展。前景中清晰展示两只未来感十足的黑色漆面无带厚底木屐，造型夸张且具有雕塑感，没有夹脚设计；木屐上装饰着金色菊花图案、红青双色织锦镶板、珍珠般的珠饰以及长长的青色流苏。周围环绕着发光的节日场景：两盏醒目的大纸灯笼，左上方为红色灯笼，右上方为暖奶油色灯笼，每盏灯笼上均有竖排书法 龍蜜；添加模糊的小灯笼、红色寺庙建筑、悬垂的紫藤花、带有花卉图案的旗帜、温暖的琥珀色灯光、湿润路面上的倒影、闪烁的焦外成像以及浅景深效果。采用超精致的 gpt-image-2 动漫美学，呈现细腻的织物纹理、丰富的对比度、戏剧性的透视缩短、亮面高光、温暖的节日照明，16:9 宽屏构图，无水印，无额外角色。
